message:
test(core): add native mux cross-module reliability harness (ft-3681t.2.7)

30 integration tests validating the full native mux stack:
- Lifecycle -> command transport routing (5 tests)
- Lifecycle -> durable state checkpoint/rollback/diff (6 tests)
- Headless mux server protocol (5 tests)
- Session profile resolution (3 tests)
- Command deduplication with TTL (1 test)
- E2E fleet provisioning and failure recovery (2 tests)
- Error paths (4 tests)
- Serde roundtrip for RemoteRequest and CheckpointTrigger (2 tests)
- Concurrent version conflict detection (1 test)
- Audit log completeness (1 test)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
